newsArray.title: 'He asks questions all the time': Abhishek Sharma reveals what Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is really like
newsArray.description: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making waves in Indian cricket after a stellar IPL 2026 and a record-breaking List A innings. Despite a maiden T20I call-up for the Ireland tour, he was benched for the first match. Teammate Abhishek Sharma praised his eagerness to learn, while the team's batting struggles in the opener have intensified calls for Sooryavanshi's debut.
creator: toi sports desk

newsArray.title: Lucknow Leopards Pioneering Investment in Indian Pickleball
newsArray.description: The Lucknow Leopards are making waves in Indian pickleball by sponsoring the national team for the upcoming World Cup and launching the Lucknow Leopards Championship. This initiative aims to create a sustainable ecosystem for player development, connecting various stages of a player's journey from local tournaments to the national team. With a focus on nurturing talent and expanding opportunities, the franchise is setting a precedent for future investments in the sport. Veteran players believe these efforts will strengthen India's national program and elevate the sport's status, making pickleball a viable career option for aspiring athletes.
creator: narendra chaudhary

newsArray.title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: ‘ಮೊದಲ ಪಂದ್ಯದಲ್ಲಿ ಸೂರ್ಯವಂಶಿ ಕೈಬಿಟ್ಟಿದ್ದು ಒಳ್ಳೆದಾಯ್ತು’! ಅಚ್ಚರಿ ಹೇಳಿಕೆ ಕೊಟ್ಟ ಮಾಜಿ ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟಿಗ!
newsArray.description: ಕೋಚ್ ಮತ್ತು ಕ್ಯಾಪ್ಟನ್ ನಿರ್ಧಾರದ ವಿರುದ್ಧ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಸ್ ಕಿಡಿಕಾರುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಹೀಗಿರುವಾಗಲೇ ಬೆಂಕಿಗೆ ತುಪ್ಪ ಸುರಿಯುವಂತೆ ಮಾಜಿ ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟಿಗರೊಬ್ಬರು ವೈಭವ್ ಅವರನ್ನು ಆಡಿಸದೇ ಇದ್ದದ್ದು ಒಳ್ಳೆಯ ನಿರ್ಧಾರ ಎಂದು ಪೋಸ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟ್ ಅಭಿಮಾನಿಗಳ ಕೆಂಗಣ್ಣಿಗೆ ಗುರಿಯಾಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
creator: shashanka sagara

newsArray.title: While India lost and Sooryavanshi waited, Rajasthan celebrated: The Jai Moondra story
newsArray.description: When the final wicket fell in Belfast, locking in Ireland's first-ever cricket victory over India, a small pocket of Rajasthan erupted in pure joy. While the match was supposed to headline the debut of Rajasthan Royals' teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, it was instead completely hijacked by a local son from Tonk who crossed continents to live his dream.
keywords: ireland first cricket win over india stormont
